data.title: Binance confirms advisory role in state-backed Bitcoin reserve initiatives
data.description:
The world’s largest crypto exchange, Binance, is reportedly engaging several countries in a plan to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve. According to The Financial Times, the exchange CEO, Richard Teng, disclosed this in a recent interview. Teng reportedly said that several countries have approached Binance to advise them on creating a strategic Bitcoin Reserve and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-confirms-advisory-role-in-state-backed-bitcoin-reserve-initiatives/

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor: US tariff policy will hit Japan's economy
data.description: Kazuo Ueda, governor of the Bank of Japan, said on the 17th that the US tariff policy will impact the Japanese economy and may have a negative impact on the international financial capital market. Kazuo Ueda said that in addition to directly affecting trade activities, the US tariff policy has also led to increased uncertainty and impacted the confidence of businesses and households. He believes that the US tariff policy will put downward pressure on the Japanese economy. He said that it is now necessary to judge the impact of tariffs on the economic and price prospects without preconceptions, and to prudently decide on appropriate financial policies based on this.

data.title: Trump: I don't regret nominating Powell
data.description: President Donald Trump also declined to say when asked by reporters that he regretted nominating Powell for the position. "I think he's terrible, but I can't complain," Trump said, noting the strong economy during his first term. Trump then went on to complain about Powell, saying he thought the Fed chairman was "playing politics" and that Powell was "someone I never really liked."

data.title: Trump: If I ask, Fed Chairman Powell will have to resign
data.description: U.S. President Trump said: "If I ask him to, Federal Reserve Chairman Powell will have to leave. I am not satisfied with him (Federal Reserve Chairman Powell). Powell is slow and slow."

data.title:
All of the leaders of the top AI Labs have all acknowledged that superhuman AI is an existential threat to humanity 

Elon, Ilya, Altman, Hassabis, Dario

Yet every lab is moving at max speed to accelerate development

We are in quite the conundrum

Probably the only person that disagrees is Yann LeCun who I would characterize as a dumb smart person. You can tell by his consistently wrong takes on everything from AI capabilities/development trajectory to politics.

Llama lagging behind everyone else is no surprise

data.title: 4 reasons why Bitcoin price could rally to $90K in April
data.description:
Key points: Monetary stimulus in China and Europe increases investors’ focus on Bitcoin price. The US Federal Reserve is under political pressure to cut rates, as the DXY weakens. Bitcoin’s decoupling from traditional markets continues to gain attention.  Bitcoin (BTC) traders are somewhat puzzled by BTC price jumping to $85,000, especially since the S&P 500 index has dropped 5
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/4-reasons-why-bitcoin-price-could-rally-to-90-k-in-april?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
